title: 2019 USAMO Problems/Problem 1
solution:
f^r(x)

f^{r-1}(x)

f^1(x)=f(x)

\hfill \break \hfill \break

f(p)=f(q)

f^2(p)=f^2(q)

f^{f(p)}(p)=f^{f(q)}(q)

\implies p^2=f^2(p)\cdot f^{f(p)}(p)=f^2(q)\cdot f^{f(q)}(q)=q^2

\implies p=\pm q

\implies p=q

p,q>0

f^r(b)=a

f(a)=a

f^r(b)=a=f^r(a)

f^2(m)=f^{f(m)}(m)=m

f(m)=m

f(m)=k

f^2(m)=m

f(k)=m

f^2(k)=k

\newline f^2(k)\cdot f^{f(k)}(k)=k^2

k\neq0

f^{f(k)}(k)=k

\implies f^m(k)=k

\implies f^{gcd(m, 2)}(k)=k

\implies f(k)=k

f^2(m)\cdot f^{f(m)}(m)=m^2

(1) f^2(m)=k<m

(2) f^{f(m)}(m)=k<m

(3) f^2(m)=m

f^{f(m)}(m)=m

f(1000)

f(1000)=x, f(x)=1000

f(k)=k

1000

f^2(n)\cdot f^{f(n)}(n)=n\cdot n=n^2

f(n)

f^2(n)=n
